infrastructure.title: Infrastructure Status
infrastructure.body:
# Infrastructure Status

## Overall Health
**HEALTHY**

All 10/10 collectors enabled and producing fresh, continuous data through 15:15Z. Broker healthy. Portfolio empty — no live trading risk. 7 active tasks (4 GLD, 3 ESTC) stable. Ingestion lag ~16 min (normal). Market reversing from earlier selloff — GLD V-reversal complete, metals surging, equities stabilizing.

## Market Context
Friday 2026-03-06, 15:31Z (10:31 AM ET). Regular session ~1 hour in. **Broad reversal underway** — GLD $473.24 (V-reversal complete, +1.19% since last check, now above session open), SLV $76.30 (+2.08%). Equities recovering: SPY $673.41 (−1.17% from open), QQQ $602.71 (safely above $600), AAPL $256.50 (stabilizing). ESTC regular-session data flowing continuously — 10 consecutive 5min bars.

## Collectors
| ID | Type | Symbol | TF | Disabled | Data Fresh | Last Bar | Last Price | Priority | Notes |
|----|------|--------|----|----------|------------|----------|------------|----------|-------|
| `[[collector/e5125995]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/GLD]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 15:15Z | 15:15Z | $473.24 | **Critical** (4 tasks) | 22 continuous bars. V-reversal complete! Above session open. |
| `[[collector/ab739989]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/ESTC]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 15:15Z | 15:15Z | $53.06 | **Important** (3 tasks) | 15 bars (2h). 10 consecutive regular-session bars — excellent frequency. |
| `[[collector/35cf414b]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/ESTC]]` | 15min | No | ✅ 15:15Z | 15:15Z | $53.675 | Low | 8 continuous bars. Consistent. |
| `[[collector/2a8681ef]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/SLV]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 15:15Z | 15:15Z | $76.295 | Low | 22 continuous bars. Strong recovery +2.08%. |
| `[[collector/3d04a943]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/NVDA]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 15:15Z | 15:15Z | $182.08 | Low | 22 continuous bars. |
| `[[collector/999b208d]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/SPY]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 15:15Z | 15:15Z | $673.41 | Low | 22 continuous bars. Recovering from selloff. |
| `[[collector/9c417caa]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/QQQ]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 15:15Z | 15:15Z | $602.71 | Low | 22 continuous bars. Safely above $600. |
| `[[collector/c00fd831]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/AAPL]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 15:15Z | 15:15Z | $256.50 | Low | 22 continuous bars. Stabilizing off lows. |
| `[[collector/f60d4dce]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/IWM]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 15:15Z | 15:15Z | $252.51 | Low | 22 continuous bars. Recovering, still worst performer. |
| `[[collector/9c3ba4ef]]` | alpaca | `[[instrument/XLE]]` | 5min | No | ✅ 15:15Z | 15:15Z | $56.67 | Low | 22 continuous bars. Energy nearly flat. |

**Summary:** 10/10 collectors enabled, all producing fresh continuous data. GLD critical path — continuous, no gaps. ESTC 10 consecutive regular-session bars (best frequency today). Ingestion lag ~16 min (normal).

## Brokers
| ID | Name | Type | Status | Notes |
|----|------|------|--------|-------|
| `[[broker/alpaca-paper]]` (ed622468) | Alpaca Paper | alpaca | ✅ Healthy | paper-api.alpaca.markets, SIP data feed. Config verified. |

## Active Issues
| Component | Issue | Since | Impact | Action Taken |
|-----------|-------|-------|--------|--------------|
| — | No active issues | — | — | — |

## Resolved Issues (last 7 days)
| Component | Issue | Duration | Resolution |
|-----------|-------|----------|------------|
| `[[collector/ab739989]]`, `[[collector/35cf414b]]` (ESTC) | Fri pre-market data late arrival | 09:00Z–11:40Z Fri (~2h40m) | First bar at 11:40Z ($52.81). Normal small-cap variation. |
| `[[collector/ab739989]]`, `[[collector/35cf414b]]` (ESTC) | No pre-market data — 4h gap | 09:00Z–13:00Z Wed 2026-03-04 (~4h) | Self-recovered at 13:00Z ($53.17). |
| ALL collectors (system-wide) | Data ingestion delayed after 14:15Z Mon 2026-03-02 | ~30 min perceived | Self-recovered. Data delayed, not lost. |
| `[[collector/ab739989]]` (ESTC 5min) | No data 09:20Z–11:55Z Mon 2026-03-02 pre-market | ~2h35m | Self-recovered. Transient Alpaca API issue. |

## Regular Session Prices (Fri 2026-03-06, 15:15Z bar — 45 min into session)
| Symbol | Price | Open | Chg from Open | vs Last Check (15:02Z) | Priority |
|--------|-------|------|---------------|------------------------|----------|
| GLD | $473.24 | $468.91 | **+0.92%** | +$5.57 ⬆️⬆️ V-REVERSAL COMPLETE | Critical |
| ESTC | $53.06 | — | — | +$0.81 ⬆️ (10 regular-session bars) | Important |
| SLV | $76.295 | $76.10 | +0.26% | +$1.56 ⬆️⬆️ (+2.08%) | Low |
| NVDA | $182.08 | $182.36 | −0.15% | +$0.33 (holding) | Low |
| SPY | $673.41 | $681.40 | −1.17% | +$2.68 ⬆️ (recovering) | Low |
| QQQ | $602.71 | $609.06 | −1.04% | +$2.62 ⬆️ (safely above $600) | Low |
| AAPL | $256.50 | $259.90 | −1.31% | +$1.30 ⬆️ (stabilizing) | Low |
| IWM | $252.51 | $257.35 | −1.88% | +$1.46 ⬆️ (recovering, still weakest) | Low |
| XLE | $56.67 | $56.77 | −0.18% | +$0.28 (nearly flat) | Low |

model-rankings.title: Model Rankings
model-rankings.body:
# Model Rankings

## Ready for Promotion

_No models currently meet all promotion criteria (score ≥ 0.80 on 5+ consecutive daily evals with confirmed backtest)._

**Nearest candidate:** `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` — daily eval **0.782** (gap: -0.018), BT **0.822** ✅✅. Only 3 evals (need 5 at ≥0.80). Estimated earliest promotion: **~Mar 9** if crosses 0.80 on Mar 5 and sustains.

## Pipeline Leaders (Ranked by Quality)

| Rank | Model | Task | Instrument | Score | BT Score | Sharpe | MaxDD | cecpp | Ops | WR | Exp | Recent cecpp | Evals | Trend | Assessment |
|------|-------|------|-----------|-------|----------|--------|-------|-------|-----|-----|-----|-------------|-------|-------|------------|
| 1 ⭐⭐⭐ | `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11) | GLD | **0.782** | **0.822** | 8.39 | **3.77%** | 0.970 | 41 | 97.6% | $31.85 | **0.831** ✅ | 3 | ⭐⭐ +20.6% SURGE | Best overall. BT confirmed. Active & healthy. |
| 2 ⭐ | `[[model/0eca618b]]` | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11) | GLD | **0.752** | **0.805** | 8.51 | 13.42% | 0.948 | 44 | 100% | $29.98 | 0.601 ⚠️ | 3 | → flat | BT 0.805 stable. IS DD 15.25% ❌ blocks promotion. |
| 3 🆕 | `[[model/48b5cd64]]` | `[[task/1d615d47]]` (EXP-14) | GLD | 0.550* | **0.744** | 7.28 | 13.25% | 0.932 | 49 | 90.0% | $24.09 | 0.447 ⚠️ | 1* | 🆕 First EXP-14 | Best IS DD headroom (5.24%). DD worsens IS→OOS ⚠️. |
| 4 | `[[model/923a4e31]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10) | GLD | **0.630** | 0.717 | 5.48 | **8.40%** | 0.966 | 63 | 87.7% | $18.52 | **0.835** ✅ | 3 | → stable | Best cross-regime safety. Cannot reach 0.80 under EXP-10 scorer. |

*\* = optimizer eval only, no daily eval yet. Expect 5-12% first-eval drop (GLD pattern).*

## Monitoring (Promising)

| Model | Task | Instrument | Score | Sharpe | MaxDD | Ops | WR | cecpp | Recent cecpp | Evals | Trend | Next Review |
|-------|------|-----------|-------|--------|-------|-----|-----|-------|-------------|-------|-------|-------------|
| `[[model/66806842]]` | `[[task/c6edbe72]]` (EXP-5) | ESTC | 0.565 | 5.28 | 13.26% | 130 | 73.4% | 0.920 | 0.771 | 8 | ↓ -7.9% (streak broken) | Mar 5 — one-off or reversal? |
| `[[model/31bff7f5]]` | `[[task/1c326293]]` (EXP-9) | ESTC | 0.561 | 4.68 | 13.91% | 89 | 82.8% | 0.904 | **0.830** ✅ | 3 | ↓ declining (window lag) | Mar 5 — recent period healthy despite eval decline |
| `[[model/ade6e576]]` | `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` (Baseline) | ESTC | 0.532 | 3.85 | 9.17% | 110 | 71.7% | 0.872 | — | 12 | → flat | Reliable baseline reference |
| `[[model/f1df6a17]]` 🆕 | `[[task/4830e9b4]]` (EXP-13) | ESTC | 0.336* | 2.84 | **5.45%** | 166 | 62.0% | 0.920 | — | 1* | 🆕 Optimizer eval | First viable NSGA-III. Expect 20-30% first-eval drop. |

## Degrading (Action Needed)

| Model | Task | Instrument | Score | Trend | Recent cecpp | MaxDD | Live? | Recommendation |
|-------|------|-----------|-------|-------|-------------|-------|-------|----------------|
| `[[model/5c6aede0]]` ⚠️ | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10) | GLD | 0.685 | ↑ artifact (+2.0%) | **0.356** ❌ | 13.36% | No | **DYING.** Score bounce is rolling-window artifact. cecpp collapse confirms. |
| `[[model/6bd6b1c2]]` ❌ | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10) | GLD | 0.641 | ↓↓ 4th decline | **~0.370** ❌ | **16.18%** ❌ | No | **DEAD.** DD breached 15%, cecpp collapsed. Write off. |
| `[[model/33e3f843]]` ⚠️ | `[[task/826092ce]]` (EXP-2: DISABLED) | ESTC | 0.626 | → below 0.65 x2 | — | 13.89% | No | 2/3 demotion evals. Task disabled. Academic. |

## Not Ready / Failed

| Model | Task | Instrument | Score | Reason |
|-------|------|-----------|-------|--------|
| `[[model/d314d811]]` | EXP-10 | GLD | 0.560 | Declining, no recovery path |
| `[[model/5aedf294]]` | EXP-10 | GLD | 0.425 | WR dropping |
| `[[model/8b53300f]]` | EXP-13 | ESTC | 0.237 | DOA — cecpp **-0.886**, negative exp |
| `[[model/34cb79b2]]` | EXP-13 | ESTC | 0.021 | 6 ops only, near-zero score |
| `[[model/310b8563]]` | EXP-13 | ESTC | 0.006 | 1 op only |
| `[[model/5b6a6124]]` | EXP-13 | ESTC | 0.006 | 1 op only |
| `[[model/f346017c]]` | EXP-13 | ESTC | **0.000** | **DEAD** — 0 ops on first daily eval (was 0.244 optimizer) |
| `[[model/8d1a36c6]]` | EXP-2 | ESTC | 0.548 | DOA — DD 31.98% |
| `[[model/73701688]]` | EXP-10 | GLD | 0.222 | Overfit |
| `[[model/133616a8]]` | EXP-11 | GLD | 0.185 | Not promising |

## Backtest Summary (Top Candidates)

### `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` ⭐⭐⭐ (EXP-11: GLD)
| Period | Days | Score | Sharpe | DD | Profit | cecpp | Ops | WR | Exp |
|--------|------|-------|--------|----|--------|-------|-----|-----|-----|
| **In-Sample** | 1709 | 0.796 | 9.50 | **14.03%** ⚠️ | $2,055 | 0.920 | 303 | 68.2% | $6.78 |
| **Full OOS** (Nov 5 - Mar 4) | 120 | **0.822** ✅✅ | 8.39 | **3.77%** ✅✅ | $1,306 | **0.970** | 41 | 97.6% | $31.85 |
| **Recent** (Jan 20 - Mar 4) | 43 | 0.520 | 5.26 | 3.35% ✅ | $650 | **0.831** ✅ | 22 | 77.3% | $29.54 |

**Verdict:** Best overall candidate. BT 0.822 confirmed across multiple checks. Recent cecpp 0.831 — model is actively healthy. Only risk: IS DD 14.03% (0.97% headroom).

### `[[model/48b5cd64]]` 🆕 (EXP-14: GLD+mut=0.35)
| Period | Days | Score | Sharpe | DD | Profit | cecpp | Ops | WR | Exp |
|--------|------|-------|--------|----|--------|-------|-----|-----|-----|
| **In-Sample** | 1709 | 0.777 | 8.88 | **9.76%** ✅ | $1,863 | 0.908 | 467 | 59.3% | $4.08 |
| **Full OOS** (Nov 5 - Mar 4) | 120 | **0.744** | 7.28 | 13.25% | $964 | 0.932 | 49 | 90.0% | $24.09 |
| **Recent** (Jan 20 - Mar 4) | 43 | 0.579 | 6.57 | 13.25% | $365 | 0.447 ⚠️ | 21 | 91.7% | $30.43 |

**Verdict:** First EXP-14 model — produced within 6 hours of task creation. Best IS DD headroom of any GLD model (5.24%). However: DD **worsens** IS→OOS (9.76%→13.25%) like 6bd6b1c2 pattern. Recent cecpp 0.447 is concerning. Needs daily evals before assessment.

### `[[model/0eca618b]]` ⭐ (EXP-11: GLD)
| Period | Days | Score | Sharpe | DD | Profit | cecpp | Ops | WR | Exp |
|--------|------|-------|--------|----|--------|-------|-----|-----|-----|
| **In-Sample** | 1709 | 0.802 | 9.81 | **15.25%** ❌ | $1,968 | 0.920 | 291 | 73.3% | $6.76 |
| **Full OOS** (Nov 5 - Mar 4) | 120 | **0.805** ✅ | 8.51 | 13.42% | $1,049 | 0.948 | 44 | **100%** | $29.98 |
| **Recent** (Jan 20 - Mar 4) | 43 | 0.536 | 4.00 | 13.42% | $426 | 0.601 ⚠️ | 25 | 100% | $26.65 |

**Verdict:** BT stable at 0.805. Recent cecpp slightly improved (0.587→0.601). **IS DD 15.25% permanently blocks promotion** — model's true risk exceeds the 15% portfolio limit.

### `[[model/923a4e31]]` (EXP-10: GLD)
| Period | Days | Score | Sharpe | DD | Profit | cecpp | Ops | WR | Exp |
|--------|------|-------|--------|----|--------|-------|-----|-----|-----|
| **In-Sample** | 1709 | 0.808 | 9.75 | **9.64%** ✅ | $2,069 | 0.894 | 371 | 68.0% | $5.58 |
| **Full OOS** (Nov 5 - Mar 4) | 120 | 0.717 | 5.48 | **8.40%** ✅✅ | $1,170 | **0.966** | 63 | 87.7% | $18.52 |
| **Recent** (Jan 20 - Mar 4) | 43 | 0.329 | 1.73 | 8.40% ✅ | $531 | **0.835** ✅ | 27 | 85.7% | $25.29 |

**Verdict:** Best cross-regime safety profile. IS DD 9.64% (5.36% headroom), DD IMPROVES IS→OOS. Cannot reach 0.80 under EXP-10 scorer due to trade_count_factor penalty.

## Recent-Period Health Check (Jan 20 - Mar 4)

| Model | Recent Score | Recent cecpp | Recent DD | Recent WR | Recent Ops | Ops/Day | Health |
|-------|-------------|-------------|-----------|-----------|-----------|---------|--------|
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` ⭐⭐⭐ | 0.520 | **0.831** ✅ | 3.35% ✅ | 77.3% | 22 | 0.51 | ✅ HEALTHY |
| `[[model/923a4e31]]` | 0.329 | **0.835** ✅ | 8.40% ✅ | 85.7% | 27 | 0.62 | ✅ HEALTHY |
| `[[model/31bff7f5]]` | 0.576 | **0.830** ✅ | 13.91% | 90.0% | 32 | 0.74 | ✅ HEALTHY (paradox) |
| `[[model/0eca618b]]` | 0.536 | 0.601 ⚠️ | 13.42% | 100% | 25 | 0.58 | ⚠️ cecpp slightly improved |
| `[[model/66806842]]` | 0.293 | 0.771 | 13.26% | 63.1% | 86 | 1.98 | ⚠️ OK (low exp $0.94) |
| `[[model/48b5cd64]]` 🆕 | 0.579 | 0.447 ⚠️ | 13.25% | 91.7% | 21 | 0.48 | ⚠️ LOW cecpp, needs monitoring |
| `[[model/5c6aede0]]` | 0.303 | **0.356** ❌ | 13.36% | 84.6% | 23 | 0.53 | ❌ DYING |
| `[[model/6bd6b1c2]]` | — | **~0.370** ❌ | **16.18%** ❌ | — | — | — | ❌ DEAD |

## DD Headroom Analysis

| Model | Instrument | OOS MaxDD | IS MaxDD | Headroom (OOS) | Headroom (IS) | DD Direction | Risk Level |
|-------|-----------|-----------|----------|----------------|---------------|-------------|------------|
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` ⭐⭐⭐ | GLD | **3.77%** | 14.03% | **11.23%** | 0.97% | ✅ Improves | ✅ OOS record / ⚠️ IS tight |
| `[[model/48b5cd64]]` 🆕 | GLD | 13.25% | **9.76%** | 1.75% | **5.24%** | ❌ Worsens | ⚠️ DD worsens IS→OOS |
| `[[model/923a4e31]]` | GLD | **8.40%** | 9.64% | **6.60%** | **5.36%** | ✅ Improves | ✅✅ BEST overall safety |
| `[[model/ade6e576]]` | ESTC | 9.17% | — | 5.83% | — | — | ✅ Moderate |
| `[[model/0eca618b]]` | GLD | 13.42% | **15.25%** | 1.58% | **-0.25%** | ✅ Improves | 🔴 IS breach |
| `[[model/66806842]]` | ESTC | 13.26% | — | 1.74% | — | — | ⚠️ Tight |
| `[[model/6bd6b1c2]]` ❌ | GLD | **16.18%** | 10.30% | **-1.18%** | 4.70% | ❌ Worsens | 🔴 BREACHED |

## Task Quality Summary

| Task | Best Model | OOS BT | Viable Models | Pop Health | Assessment |
|------|-----------|--------|---------------|-----------|------------|
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11: GLD tuned) ⭐⭐ | `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` ⭐⭐⭐ | **0.822** ✅ | 2/3 | ✅ 194/200 | ⭐⭐ **DOMINANT.** Only current path to promotion. |
| `[[task/1d615d47]]` (EXP-14: GLD+0.35) 🆕 | `[[model/48b5cd64]]` 🆕 | **0.744** | 1/1 | 🆕 New | 🆕 First model in 6h. Best IS DD headroom. Needs monitoring. |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10: GLD) | `[[model/923a4e31]]` | 0.717 | 2/6 active | ✅ 200/200 | Best cross-regime safety. |
| `[[task/c6edbe72]]` (EXP-5: ESTC) | `[[model/66806842]]` | — | 1/2 | ✅ 149/200 | Streak broken. Monitor. |
| `[[task/1c326293]]` (EXP-9: ESTC DD-wt) | `[[model/31bff7f5]]` | — | 1/3 | ⚠️ 116/200 | Declining but recent healthy (window lag). |
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` (Baseline: ESTC) | `[[model/ade6e576]]` | — | 1/5 | ✅ 200/200 | Reliable control. |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` (EXP-13: NSGA-III) | `[[model/f1df6a17]]` 🆕 | — | 1/6 | ✅ 200/200 | First viable model. f346017c confirmed dead. |

## Promotion Timeline

- **Nearest candidate:** `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` — daily eval 0.782, BT 0.822
- **Earliest promotion:** ~Mar 9 (if crosses 0.80 on Mar 5 eval and sustains 5 consecutive)
- **Backup:** `[[model/0eca618b]]` — daily eval 0.752, BT 0.805 (IS DD risk blocks promotion)
- **Dark horse:** `[[model/48b5cd64]]` — BT 0.744, IS DD 9.76%. If daily evals stabilize high, could become promotion candidate in ~1 week.
- **Safest (needs scorer change):** `[[model/923a4e31]]` — BT 0.717, DD 8.40%, IS DD 9.64%

## Key Changes Since Last Report (14:00Z)

1. **`[[model/48b5cd64]]` 🆕 — First EXP-14 model.** BT 0.744. IS DD 9.76% (best headroom). DD worsens IS→OOS and recent cecpp 0.447 are concerns.
2. **`[[model/0eca618b]]`** — OOS BT stable at 0.805. OOS WR now 100% (44W/0L). Recent cecpp slightly improved (0.587→0.601).
3. **`[[model/f346017c]]`** — Dropped to 0.000 on first daily eval (0 ops). Confirmed dead.
4. **No new daily evals** — next batch is Mar 5 02:15Z.

## Summary

- **Total models in system:** 57
- **Actively monitored:** 13 (4 leaders + 4 monitoring + 3 degrading + 2 new/awaiting)
- **Above BT 0.80:** 2 (`[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` at 0.822, `[[model/0eca618b]]` at 0.805)
- **Above daily eval 0.80:** 0
- **Newly promoted candidates:** 0
- **New models this cycle:** 1 — `[[model/48b5cd64]]` (EXP-14, BT 0.744)
- **Degrading models flagged:** 3 (5c6aede0 dying, 6bd6b1c2 dead, 33e3f843 demotion path)
- **Active tasks producing:** 7 (Baseline, EXP-5, EXP-9, EXP-10, EXP-11, EXP-13, EXP-14)
- **Next critical event:** Mar 5 02:15Z — will `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` cross 0.80 on daily eval?

# Portfolio Status

## Portfolios

| `[[portfolio/paper-alpha-01]]` (447e2d45) | 0/0 | 0.00 | `[[broker/alpaca-paper]]` (ed622468) |

## Active Models
| Portfolio | Model | Allocation | Enabled Since | Score | Sharpe | MaxDD | Expectancy | Orders (24h) | Status |
|-----------|-------|------------|---------------|-------|--------|-------|------------|--------------|--------|
| — | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | Portfolio empty. No live trading. |

## Recent Changes
| Date | Portfolio | Model | Action | Reason |
|------|-----------|-------|--------|--------|
| 2026-03-06 | — | — | **HOLD** (no actions) | ⭐ `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` crossed 0.80 on eval 5 (0.8052) — first EVER daily eval above promotion threshold! But only 1 of 5 required consecutive evals at ≥0.80. Score volatile (0.7384 on Mar 5 bad GLD day). All GLD models crashed Mar 5, recovered Mar 6 — confirms GLD concentration risk. `[[model/0eca618b]]` surged to 0.7940 (0.006 from 0.80). `[[model/48b5cd64]]` surged to 0.7700 (+41%). `[[model/33e3f843]]` 4th consecutive below 0.65 (formal demotion, not live). No models meet promotion criteria yet. |
| 2026-03-04 | — | — | **HOLD** (no actions) | 7f7ac2e4 surged to 0.7824 (gap -0.018). 66806842 streak broken. 33e3f843 2/3 demotion. |
| 2026-03-03 | — | — | **HOLD** (no actions) | 0eca618b anomalous +10.5% to 0.7527. 7f7ac2e4 BT breakthrough (0.810). |
| 2026-02-19 | `[[portfolio/paper-alpha-01]]` | — | Portfolio created | Initial setup with `[[broker/alpaca-paper]]`. |

## Capacity
- Available allocation headroom: 100%
- Models pending promotion: 0 (none meet ≥0.80 threshold with 5+ consecutive stable evals)
- Closest to threshold: `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` at **0.8052** (1 of 5 consecutive evals at ≥0.80 — needs 4 more)
- Estimated earliest promotion: **~Mar 11** (if 7f7ac2e4 sustains ≥0.80 on evals 6-9, Mar 7-10)

## Pipeline Leaders (Updated Mar 6 — Post 02:15Z Eval Batch)

| Rank | Model | Instrument | Task | Score | Evals | Trend | SQN | MaxDD | cecpp | Ops | WR | Exp | Sharpe | Promotable? |
|------|-------|-----------|------|-------|-------|-------|-----|-------|-------|-----|-----|-----|--------|-------------|
| 1 ⭐⭐⭐ | `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` | GLD | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11) | **0.8052** | 5 | ⬆️ CROSSED 0.80! | 7.90 | **3.77%** | 0.969 | 41 | 97.5% | $31.30 | 7.90 | ✅ 1/5 consecutive at ≥0.80. Needs 4 more. |
| 2 ⭐⭐ | `[[model/0eca618b]]` | GLD | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11) | **0.7940** | 5 | ⬆️ Surged +14.4% | 8.13 | 13.42% | 0.942 | 43 | 100% | $29.39 | 8.13 | ⚠️ IS DD 15.25% blocks promotion |
| 3 🆕 | `[[model/48b5cd64]]` | GLD | `[[task/1d615d47]]` (EXP-14) | **0.7700** | 3 (2 daily) | ⬆️ +41% surge | 7.64 | 13.25% | 0.923 | 44 | 97.1% | $27.45 | — | 🆕 Too few evals. Watch closely. |
| 4 | `[[model/923a4e31]]` | GLD | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10) | **0.7023** | 5 | ⬆️ Recovered from 0.4912 | 6.17 | **8.40%** | 0.964 | 60 | 88.9% | $20.53 | — | ✅ Best safety. Cannot reach 0.80 under EXP-10. |
| 5 ⚠️ | `[[model/5c6aede0]]` | GLD | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10) | **0.7381** | 6 | ⬆️ GLD recovery bounce | — | 13.36% | 0.912 | 53 | — | — | — | ⚠️ DYING (cecpp collapse confirmed) |
| 6 ⚠️ | `[[model/33e3f843]]` | ESTC | `[[task/826092ce]]` (EXP-2) | **0.5823** | 12 | ⬇️ Crashed to 0.58 | — | 13.89% | 0.957 | 121 | — | — | — | ❌ 4 consecutive below 0.65. Demotion. Not live. |
| 7 | `[[model/66806842]]` | ESTC | `[[task/c6edbe72]]` (EXP-5) | **0.5675** | 10 | → Oscillating | — | 13.26% | 0.918 | 144 | 70.7% | — | — | ↘️ Choppy. Far from threshold. |

## DD Headroom
| Model | Instrument | OOS MaxDD | IS MaxDD | Headroom (OOS) | Headroom (IS) | Risk |
|-------|-----------|-----------|----------|----------------|---------------|------|
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` ⭐⭐⭐ | GLD | **3.77%** | 14.03% | **11.23%** | 0.97% | ✅ OOS RECORD / ⚠️ IS tight |
| `[[model/923a4e31]]` | GLD | **8.40%** | 9.64% | **6.60%** | **5.36%** | ✅✅ BEST overall safety |
| `[[model/48b5cd64]]` 🆕 | GLD | 13.25% | 9.76% | 1.75% | **5.24%** | ⚠️ DD worsens IS→OOS |
| `[[model/0eca618b]]` | GLD | 13.42% | **15.25%** | 1.58% | **-0.25%** | 🔴 IS BREACH |
| `[[model/5c6aede0]]` | GLD | 13.36% | 13.10% | 1.64% | 1.90% | ⚠️ DYING |
| `[[model/66806842]]` | ESTC | 13.26% | — | 1.74% | — | ⚠️ Tight |
| `[[model/33e3f843]]` | ESTC | 13.89% | — | 1.11% | — | ❌ Demoted (not live) |

## Key Observations This Cycle

### 1. ⭐ `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` FIRST EVER Daily Eval Above 0.80
Score 0.8052 on eval 5 (Mar 6 02:15Z). This is the FIRST daily evaluation in Harvester history to exceed the 0.80 promotion threshold. Stats remain exceptional: DD 3.77% (record), cecpp 0.969, WR 97.5%, Exp $31.30, Sharpe 7.90. However, score volatility is concerning — the model dipped to 0.7384 on Mar 5 (bad GLD day) before recovering. Need 4 more consecutive evals at ≥0.80 before promotion.

### 2. GLD Concentration Risk CONFIRMED
Mar 5-6 pattern proves ALL GLD models move in lockstep. Mar 5 selloff impact: 7f7ac2e4 (-5.6%), 0eca618b (-7.7%), 923a4e31 (-22%), 48b5cd64 (-0.9%), 5c6aede0 (-16.8%). Mar 6 recovery: ALL bounced back. If multiple GLD models go live, they'll dip together — single-instrument concentration risk.

### 3. `[[model/0eca618b]]` Nearly Hit 0.80 (0.7940)
Surged +14.4% from 0.6940 (Mar 5 crash) to 0.7940 — only 0.006 from threshold. But IS DD 15.25% permanently blocks promotion.

### 4. `[[model/48b5cd64]]` Fast Riser
Surged to 0.7700 (+41% from daily eval 2). Only 2 proper daily evals — way too early to assess. Watch for first-eval inflation correction.

### 5. `[[model/33e3f843]]` — Formal Demotion (4 consecutive < 0.65)
Score crashed to 0.5823 on Mar 6. Now 4 consecutive evals below 0.65 (threshold: 3+). Formal demotion status. NOT live — no portfolio action needed.

## Risks & Concerns
1. **GLD concentration**: ALL top candidates are GLD. No ESTC model close to promotion. Single-instrument correlated risk.
2. **Score volatility**: 7f7ac2e4's eval-to-eval swings (±20%) make 5 consecutive at ≥0.80 challenging.
3. **IS DD headroom for 7f7ac2e4**: Only 0.97% headroom (14.03% IS DD vs 15% limit).
4. **Promotion timeline**: Earliest ~Mar 11 IF 7f7ac2e4 sustains ≥0.80 for 4 more evals. Mar 5 dip shows this is not guaranteed.
5. **No diversification**: Entire pipeline is GLD-heavy. Need ESTC models to mature before multi-model portfolio.

task-performance.title: Task Performance Report
task-performance.body:
# Task Performance Report

## Top Performing Tasks

| Task | Type | Avg Score | Avg Sharpe | Avg MaxDD | Avg Ops | Best Model | Models Produced | Notes |
|------|------|-----------|------------|-----------|---------|------------|-----------------|-------|
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11: GLD tuned, mut=0.3) | graph | ~0.76 | ~11.9 | ~4.0% | ~54 | `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` (**0.857** ⭐⭐⭐) | 4 (3 viable) | ⭐⭐⭐ **NEW RECORD.** 4fc2c04e at 0.857 (highest ever). 7f7ac2e4 crossed 0.80 (0.805 daily eval). |
| `[[task/1d615d47]]` (EXP-14: GLD, mut=0.35, tuned) | graph | ~0.80 | ~9.4 | ~10.6% | ~40 | `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` (0.833) | 4 (3 viable) | ⭐⭐ **3 models above 0.80!** 50c0ac0b (0.816/0.833), 19c1f02b (0.811/0.810). IS DD 19%+ blocks promotion. |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10: GLD, mut=0.3) | graph | ~0.69 | ~8.7 | ~12.3% | ~55 | `[[model/61694274]]` (**0.833**) | 8 (4 viable) | ⭐⭐ **SURPRISE.** 61694274+2704110c scoring 0.827/0.833 with IS DD **10.28%** ✅. Best promotion safety profile. |
| `[[task/c6edbe72]]` (EXP-5: ESTC, mut=0.35) | graph | ~0.42 | ~5.3 | ~13.3% | ~130 | `[[model/66806842]]` (0.567) | 2 viable | ⚠️ 66806842 declining. Far from 0.80. Pop 165. |
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` (Baseline: ESTC, mut=0.6) | graph | ~0.33 | ~4.0 | ~10.5% | ~100 | `[[model/ade6e576]]` (~0.537) | 5 | Stable control. Pop 200/200. |

## Underperforming Tasks

| Task | Type | Avg Score | Common Weakness | Models Produced | Recommendation |
|------|------|-----------|-----------------|-----------------|----------------|
| `[[task/1c326293]]` (EXP-9: ESTC DD-weighted, mut=0.3) | graph | ~0.46 | **Pop death spiral** (200→88→116→95). Models declining. | 2 | ❌ **DISABLED Mar 6.** |
| `[[task/79109412]]` (EXP-12: SLV, mut=0.3) | graph | ~0.38 | ALL DOA. DD 37%+. SLV structural volatility. | 3 (0 viable) | ❌ DISABLED Mar 4 |
| `[[task/826092ce]]` (EXP-2: ESTC, mut=0.3) | graph | ~0.48 | Systemic DD. | 6 | ❌ DISABLED Mar 3 |
| `[[task/7e17cdee]]` (EXP-8: NVDA, mut=0.3) | graph | ~0.22 | All below 0.27. NVDA doesn't support long-short. | 4 | ❌ DISABLED Mar 2 |

## Active Experiments

| Task | Hypothesis | Started | Status |
|------|-----------|---------|--------|
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` (Baseline: mut=0.6) | Control/baseline | 2026-02-13 | ✅ Reliable. Pop 200/200. Stable. |
| `[[task/c6edbe72]]` (EXP-5: mut=0.35) | Intermediate rate for ESTC trajectory | 2026-02-23 | ⚠️ 66806842 declining (0.567). Pop 165. Far from 0.80. |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10: GLD, mut=0.3) | GLD produces viable long-short models | 2026-02-27 | ⭐⭐ **61694274/2704110c at 0.827/0.833!** IS DD 10.28%. Best promotion safety. Pop 200. |
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11: GLD scorer-tuned, mut=0.3) | Lowering trade_count_factor removes GLD frequency penalty | 2026-03-02 | ⭐⭐⭐ **4fc2c04e at 0.857! 7f7ac2e4 crossed 0.80 (0.805).** Pop 200. |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` (EXP-13: NSGA-III ESTC, mut=0.35) | NSGA-III maintains better population diversity on ESTC | 2026-03-03 | 🟡 64a144a1 at 0.504/0.514. f1df6a17 stable at 0.318. Pop 200. |
| `[[task/1d615d47]]` (EXP-14: GLD, mut=0.35, tuned scorer) | mut=0.35 improves GLD model diversity/robustness | 2026-03-04 | ⭐⭐ **3 models above 0.80!** But IS DD 19%+ blocks promotion. |
| `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15: NSGA-III on GLD, tuned scorer) 🆕 | **NSGA-III diversity maintenance finds low-IS-DD GLD models** | **2026-03-06** | 🆕 **NEW.** Combines best instrument + scorer + NSGA-III selection + improved features. |

## Model Score Leaderboard (Mar 6 Evals)

| Rank | Model | Task | Score | Prev | Δ | OOS DD | IS DD | cecpp | Ops | WR | Trend |
|------|-------|------|-------|------|---|--------|-------|-------|-----|-----|-------|
| 1 🆕 | `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` ⭐⭐⭐ | EXP-11 (GLD) | **0.857** | — | — | **4.04%** ✅✅ | **18.35%** ❌ | 0.980 | 54 | 100% | 🆕 **HIGHEST SCORE EVER.** IS DD blocks promotion. |
| 2 | `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` ⭐⭐ | EXP-14 (GLD) | **0.816** | 0.833 | -2.0% | **9.44%** ✅ | **19.27%** ❌ | 0.921 | 38 | 100% | 2 evals ≥ 0.80 |
| 3 | `[[model/61694274]]` ⭐⭐ | EXP-10 (GLD) | **0.827** | 0.833 | -0.7% | 13.26% | **10.28%** ✅ | 0.912 | 60 | 100% | ⭐ 2 evals ≥ 0.80. **Best IS DD headroom (4.72%).** |
| 4 | `[[model/19c1f02b]]` ⭐ | EXP-14 (GLD) | **0.811** | 0.810 | +0.1% | — | **19.36%** ❌ | 0.913 | 31 | 96.8% | 2 evals ≥ 0.80. IS DD blocks. |
| 5 ⬆ | `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` ⭐⭐ | EXP-11 (GLD) | **0.805** | 0.738 | **+9.1%** | ~3.77% ✅ | 14.03% ⚠️ | 0.970 | 42 | 97.6% | ⭐⭐ **CROSSED 0.80!** 1 eval ≥ 0.80 of 5 needed. |
| 6 | `[[model/2704110c]]` ⭐ | EXP-10 (GLD) | **0.827** | 0.833 | -0.7% | 13.26% | — | 0.912 | 60 | 100% | Twin of 61694274. 2 evals ≥ 0.80. |
| 7 | `[[model/0eca618b]]` | EXP-11 (GLD) | **0.794** | 0.752 | +5.6% | 13.42% | **15.25%** ❌ | 0.948 | 44 | 100% | Rising but IS DD blocks. |
| 8 | `[[model/48b5cd64]]` | EXP-14 (GLD) | **0.770** | 0.545 | +41.3% | 13.25% | 9.76% ✅ | 0.923 | 44 | — | Big recovery. DD worsens IS→OOS. |
| 9 | `[[model/9802794d]]` 🆕 | EXP-14 (GLD) | **0.769** | — | — | — | **19.05%** ❌ | — | — | — | 🆕 First eval. IS DD blocks. |
| 10 | `[[model/923a4e31]]` | EXP-10 (GLD) | **0.702** | 0.630 | +11.4% | 8.40% ✅ | 9.64% ✅ | 0.966 | 63 | 87.7% | Safe but penalized by EXP-10 scorer. |

## Promotion Candidates (Updated)

| Model | Task | Latest Eval | Evals ≥0.80 | IS DD | OOS DD | DD Direction | Status |
|-------|------|------------|-------------|-------|--------|-------------|--------|
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` ⭐⭐ | EXP-11 | **0.805** | **1**/5 | 14.03% ⚠️ | 3.77% ✅ | ✅ Improves | Active candidate — tight IS DD |
| `[[model/61694274]]` ⭐⭐ | EXP-10 | 0.827 | **2**/5 | **10.28%** ✅ | 13.26% | ❌ Worsens | **SAFEST CANDIDATE** — best IS DD headroom |
| `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` ⭐ | EXP-14 | 0.816 | **2**/5 | 19.27% ❌ | **9.44%** ✅ | ✅ Improves | High IS DD risk |
| `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` ⭐⭐⭐ | EXP-11 | **0.857** | **1**/5 | **18.35%** ❌ | 4.04% ✅ | ✅ Improves | Highest score ever, IS DD blocks |
| `[[model/19c1f02b]]` ⭐ | EXP-14 | 0.811 | **2**/5 | 19.36% ❌ | — | — | IS DD blocks |

## Task Optimization Health

| Task | Best Fitness | Pop Size | Errors | Health |
|------|-------------|----------|--------|--------|
| `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 (GLD) | 0.543 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Healthiest |
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` Baseline | 0.706 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Stable |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` EXP-13 (NSGA-III) | 0.239 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Full pop |
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 (GLD tuned) | 0.621 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Excellent |
| `[[task/1d615d47]]` EXP-14 (GLD+mut=0.35) | 0.643 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Excellent |
| `[[task/c6edbe72]]` EXP-5 | 0.552 | 165/200 | 0 | ✅ OK |
| `[[task/1c326293]]` EXP-9 (DD-wt) | 0.819 | **95/200** ❌ | 0 | ❌ **DISABLED** — pop death spiral |
| `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 (NSGA-III GLD) 🆕 | — | — | — | 🆕 Just created |

## Key Findings This Cycle

### 1. `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` Crosses 0.80 — First Model at Promotion Threshold ⭐⭐ **HEADLINE**
Daily eval on Mar 6: **0.8052**. First model in platform history to cross 0.80. Still needs 4 more consecutive evals ≥ 0.80 for promotion (earliest ~Mar 10). Full OOS BT previously confirmed at 0.822. IS DD 14.03% (0.97% headroom — tight).

### 2. `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` Sets New Record: 0.857 ⭐⭐⭐
Brand new EXP-11 model scored **0.857** on first eval — highest score in platform history. OOS DD 4.04% (record), cecpp 0.980, SQN 15.47, 54W/0L. However, IS DD **18.35%** exceeds 15% limit and blocks promotion.

### 3. EXP-10 Produces 0.83 Models — With Safe IS DD ⭐⭐
`[[model/61694274]]` and `[[model/2704110c]]` from EXP-10 (baseline GLD scorer) scored 0.827/0.833 on their first two daily evals. Crucially, IS DD is **10.28%** — the best IS DD headroom of any model above 0.80. DD worsens IS→OOS (10.28%→13.26%) but stays within 15%.

### 4. EXP-14 Produces 3 Models Above 0.80 — But IS DD Blocks All
`[[model/50c0ac0b]]` (0.816/0.833), `[[model/19c1f02b]]` (0.811/0.810), `[[model/9802794d]]` (0.769). All have IS DD ~19% (far above 15%). The mut=0.35 on GLD produces high scores but higher IS risk. OOS DD for 50c0ac0b is excellent (9.44%).

### 5. EXP-9 Disabled — DD-Weighted Scorer Kills Population on ESTC
Population dropped 116→95 (continuing death spiral pattern 200→88→116→95). All models declining. DD-weighted scorer creates unsustainable selection pressure on ESTC.

### 6. EXP-15 Created: NSGA-III on GLD ⭐
New experiment combines: GLD (best instrument) + tuned scorer (40,480,120) + NSGA-III selection (divisions=4) + improved features `["score","cecpp","num_operations","expectancy"]`. Hypothesis: NSGA-III diversity will explore niches with lower IS DD.

## IS DD Risk Analysis — Critical New Pattern

| IS DD Range | Models | Promotable? | Pattern |
|-------------|--------|------------|---------|
| < 10% | 48b5cd64 (9.76%), 923a4e31 (9.64%) | ✅ If scores reach 0.80 | DD worsens IS→OOS |
| 10-14% | 7f7ac2e4 (14.03%), 61694274 (10.28%) | ⚠️ Tight but possible | Mixed DD direction |
| 15%+ | 4fc2c04e (18.35%), 50c0ac0b (19.27%), 19c1f02b (19.36%), 0eca618b (15.25%), 9802794d (19.05%) | ❌ Blocked | DD improves IS→OOS but IS too high |

**Key insight:** Higher IS DD models often have BETTER OOS DD (improving direction). But IS DD >15% means the model experienced dangerous drawdowns historically — live deployment risk.

## Mutation Rate Performance (Updated)

| Rate | Task(s) | Best Score | IS DD Pattern | OOS DD Pattern | Assessment |
|------|---------|-----------|--------------|---------------|------------|
| **0.3** | EXP-10, EXP-11 | **0.857** (4fc2c04e) | Mixed (10.28-18.35%) | Low (3.77-13.26%) | ✅ Highest peaks, mixed IS risk |
| **0.35** | EXP-14, EXP-5, EXP-13 | 0.833 (50c0ac0b) | High (19%+) | Good (9.44%) | ⚠️ High IS DD pattern |
| **0.6** | Baseline | ~0.537 | — | 9.17% | ✅ Safe, low peak |

## Infrastructure
- **7 active tasks** (Baseline, EXP-5, EXP-10, EXP-11, EXP-13, EXP-14, EXP-15 🆕) + 10 disabled
- **35 workers active** (7 tasks × 5 workers)
